title: Branding APIs
description: Branding API’s enables you to customize all customer facing pages provided by Surfboard. The branding can be configured at various levels similar to the terminal config.

apis.heading: Create Branding for Merchant
apis.description: Create a branding configuration for customizable pages at merchant level

reqParams.name: backgroundColor
reqParams.description: Background color for the page.

reqParams.name: brandColor
reqParams.description: Primary brand color for your page.

reqParams.name: footerColor
reqParams.description: Footer's background color on the page.

reqParams.name: accentColor
reqParams.description: This a secondary color that compliments your brand color.

reqParams.name: rectShape
reqParams.description: Decides the shape of the page buttons. The available shapes are 'rounded','pill' and 'edgy'.

reqParams.name: fontType
reqParams.description: Font family for the customizable page. The available font types are 'sans-serif','serif' and 'mono'.

reqParams.name: logoUrl
reqParams.description: Logo that will be displayed on the page.

reqParams.name: iconUrl
reqParams.description: Icon that will be displayed on the page.

reqParams.name: primaryCoverImage
reqParams.description: Primary cover image that will be displayed on the page.

reqParams.name: secondaryCoverImage
reqParams.description: Secondary cover image that will be displayed on the page.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.
